G

Game - Class in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo
Represents a Game entity in the system.
Game(int, String, String, int, String, String, String) - Constructor for class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Game
Constructs a Game object with all required attributes.
GAME_COLUMN_DEV_ID - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
References developer ID from developers table.
GAME_COLUMN_GENRE - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
Genre/category of the game.
GAME_COLUMN_ID - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
Primary key column for games table.
GAME_COLUMN_IMAGE - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
URL/path to game image resource.
GAME_COLUMN_PLAT_ID - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
References platform ID from platforms table.
GAME_COLUMN_TITLE - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
Title of the game.
GAME_COLUMN_YEAR - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
Release year of the game.

Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Game entities.
gameImage(String) - Static method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.utils.NodeConsts
Loads an image from a URL and applies fixed display sizing.
GameTable - Class in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tables
Data Access Object implementation for Game entities.

Private constructor to prevent instantiation.
genre - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Game
Genre/category of the game
getAllDevelopers() - Method in interface org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.dao.DeveloperDAO
Retrieves all developers from the data source.
getAllDevelopers() - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tables.DeveloperTable
Retrieves all developers from the database.
getAllGames() - Method in interface org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.dao.GameDAO
Retrieves all games from the data source.
getAllGames() - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tables.GameTable
Retrieves all games from the database, including associated developer and platform information using SQL joins.
getAllPlatforms() - Method in interface org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.dao.PlatformDAO
Retrieves all platforms from the data source.
getAllPlatforms() - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tables.PlatformTable
Retrieves all platforms from the database.

Returns the active database connection.

getId() - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Game
Gets game ID.
getId() - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Platform

Creates a short delay transition used after deletion to improve user experience before showing confirmation feedback.

Singleton instance of GameTable used for all database operations related to Game entities.

Singleton instance of GameTable used for executing database operations related to Game entities.
gt - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.StatisticsTab
